## What this changes

A short description of the change to the skill or its docs.

## Why

The problem it solves, or the issue it closes (`Closes #...`).

## How it was validated

Since the skill is a prompt, describe the end-to-end run you used:
- The `/spec` invocation you tested with.
- Whether Check A triggered (sub-agent or fallback table).
- That the resulting spec had executable acceptance criteria.

## Checklist

- [ ] No personal paths (`/Users/...`) or secrets in the diff.
- [ ] Core invariants preserved (investigate-first, self-check, two-layer §12, anti-Potemkin AC) — or the PR explains the intended trade-off.
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` for user-visible changes.
